title: Senior Doctor - Medanta - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Medanta - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Medanta has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!
